# NOW

## Goal
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
Turn the offline X-post evidence pack into a reusable first-response readout.

## Current State
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- The wrapper already supports worker and verifier entry scripts.
- The current reliability suite covers feedback-workflow, macro-shock, and latest-event real-task packs.
- This fixture should stress social-evidence extraction discipline rather than external truth verification.

## Confirmed Facts
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- This task is about faithful X-post extraction first.
- The output needs source-faithful separation between post text, thread text, and image evidence.
- The final artifact should disclose what is only confirmed from the post itself.

## Unresolved Questions
<!-- token-budget: 140 -->
- The offline pack does not fully resolve whether the claim is true outside the post itself.

## Next Step
<!-- token-budget: 80 -->
Run the worker on the pack, then verify that image text and external confirmation boundaries stay explicit.

## Risks / Invalidation
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
- OCR-like image text could be accidentally upgraded into original post wording.
- A strong-sounding thread could be mistaken for external confirmation.
